messages.text: The hollow husk closes cold, empty hands on you and the void where its heart should be drags the warmth out of you. The blow {verb} you!
The hollow husk gropes for you out of a black recess and you slip past its grasping hands.
The hollow husk folds both hands over you and for a heartbeat you feel yourself being hollowed out to match it! The blow {verb} you!
